summary: List all available permission templates for a Project
description: Returns the name, id, and project specific status for all Permission Templates available to use on the specified Project for those with Admin Permissions. If a user has access to the Directory Granular Permission of 'Create and Edit Users' they will be able to fetch a list of their assignable templates if they pass the filter `assignables_only` as true

id.description: The ID of the Permission Template

name.description: The name of the Permission Template

project_specific.description: If the Permission Template is project specific

category.description: The category of the Permission Template
